reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Le hicimos una consulta al chico sobre cómo retomar a la autopista y nos mandó por cualquier lado. Instalaciones viejas. No tenían la promoción de ypf de loncheras.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. We asked the guy how to get back to the highway, and he sent us all over the place. The facilities were old. They didn't have the YPF lunchbox promotion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdE1QcG9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ultimamente cargue combustible infinia, y estaba habilitado un solo surtidor, lo que hizo que la espera sea mayor, mas alla que habia playeros suficientes.

(Translated by Google)
I recently filled up with Infinia fuel, and only one pump was open, which made the wait longer, even though there were enough attendants.
